description_long: This factory building features a large, arched central hall with a reddish-brown roof flanked by two lower wings, all constructed from tan brickwork. The facade is adorned with tall, industrial-style windows and a prominent clock tower rising from one corner, topped with a spire. A tall smokestack and visible rooftop machinery, such as vents and mechanical units, suggest its industrial function. The main entrance is grand, with large arched windows and multiple blue doors, while the sides are lined with evenly spaced windows and utility access points. The building's architectural style blends early 20th-century industrial design with decorative brickwork and geometric detailing. The overall structure is robust, with a hard, matte exterior and a layout typical of historic urban factories.
description: A large, tan brick factory building with a central arched roof, clock tower, smokestack, and many industrial windows, featuring early 20th-century industrial design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large arched windows, clock tower, and smokestack.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long row of industrial windows, the full height of the clock tower, and the smokestack at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view with the arched roof, clock tower, and smokestack visible, as well as rooftop machinery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the building, industrial windows, and rooftop equipment.
